questions.statement: Yeast used in making bread __________.
options: Acts as a catalyst for fermentation. /
Does not help the process of fermentation. /

questions.statement: For which of the following diseases has U.S. FDA approved the first vaccine Dengvaxia in 2019?
What helps in food digestion?
<span style="">Which of the following dietary components per gram provides the highest energy in humans?</span>
Which of the following is responsible for dwarfism in humans?
How much salt is present in our body?
Which essential element is used in the synthesis of proteins and other compounds in plants?
&#39;A camel is called the ship of the desert&#39; is drawn from the assumption:
options: Camels are used for transportation in deserts. /
The shape of a camel is like a ship. /

questions.statement: In human body, vertebrae are part of________
questions.explanation: <p>Vertebrae&nbsp;are the 33 individual bones that interlock with each other to form the&nbsp;spinal column.</p>

questions.statement: Two bones can be connected to each other by another type of connective tissue called the ___________.
The transformation of silkworms and frog larvae into adults through drastic changes is called __________.
Kidney failure is treated periodically on a kidney machine. The process is known as ________.
With reference to deficiency diseases, rickets is caused by the deficiency of ________.
Which organ in the human body produces bile juice?
